name: Deck
subtitle: Generated HTML slide decks
pagePrompt: When viewing decks, offer to: create a new deck, regenerate a failed one, summarize what's in progress, or open the output file.

createAction.label: New deck
createAction.prompt: Start a new deck. Ask the user for the topic in one sentence. Then invoke the Slide Generator agent to load the active DeckDesignProfile, produce an outline, ask up to two follow-ups (audience, slide count, tone), and generate the HTML. Save the file under workspace.storage at profile.decksDir/<deck-id>.html and write the path to the deck record's outputPath.
